<h1 align="center">Hi there👋, I'm Mahmoud Hany</h1>
<h3 align="center">🧑🏻‍💻 Dedicated Software Engineer | Full Stack .NET Web Developer</h3>

## 🙋‍♂️ About me

![profile view count](https://komarev.com/ghpvc/?username=MahmoudHanySalem)
<br/>
I’m a junior full-stack developer who builds digital solutions that turn business goals into reliable, working applications. I focus on scalable, efficient systems using ASP.NET Core backends and Angular frontends, with SQL Server for data persistence.<br>
Graduate of Faculty of Science, Alexandria University Bachelor of Science in Computer Science (GPA 3.9)
